event: Britain enters the war; general European war
First Marne: German advance on Paris stopped
Ottoman entry closes the Straits (Russian trade cut)
Brusilov Offensive begins: Austrian front collapses
Bucharest falls to the Central Powers
United States declares war on Germany
Bolshevik repudiation of Tsarist debts (decree of 3 Feb)
Amiens: 'black day of the German Army'
Bulgaria signs armistice; Hindenburg demands peace
